summary: DITTO v0.3 profile sandbox enforcement — application plan line 754의 '실제로 적용' 기준을 충족. codex/claude-code 5 profile 매핑 + isolated worktree 격리 + defense-in-depth profile fixture가 들어가고 모든 AC가 pass로 기록되었다.

evidence.summary: Sandbox flag matrix, worktree lifecycle, network-off layering, schema extension, and regression fixture layout pinned in a single design note before implementation.

pass: codex maps to --sandbox per profile (read-only, workspace-write, reviewer, isolated mapped; networked surfaces network limitation). claude-code maps to --permission-mode per profile with best-effort caveat surface.
pass: real codex/claude binaries spawn successfully under the new args.
pass: isolated profile fixture confirms mock adapter sees the .ditto/worktrees/<runId>/ path as repoRoot, manifest.worktree_path is set, and the main repo working tree is not touched.
createWorktreeForRun helper uses git worktree add --detach to materialize a per-run worktree under .ditto/worktrees/<runId>.

pass: codex sandbox modes restrict outbound as a byproduct (networked profile surfaces 'network is not forced open' unverified); claude-code surfaces 'network is not forced open' unverified for networked; wrapper proxy env scrub (HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY/NO_PROXY/ALL_PROXY) still applied for every non-networked profile.
pass: case (a) cwd escape rejected before spawn; case (c) read-only/reviewer writes flagged via parameterized profile policy fixture.

pass: case (b) defense-in-depth — profileUnverified surfaces escape paths as a separate unverified entry. git status does not produce such paths naturally, so verification is at the helper boundary; provider-native sandbox enforcement is the in-flight layer and is covered by AC-2 matrix tests.

remaining_risks: provider CLI 버전 drift — codex `--sandbox` 모드 이름과 claude-code permission flag 시그니처가 release 사이 바뀔 수 있다.
git worktree 생성/cleanup이 spawn crash 시 orphan worktree를 남길 수 있다.
provider-native network-off flag가 모든 provider/버전에 안정적으로 존재하지 않을 수 있다.
